stemHtml: In a visual (circling) procedure, the OCH (Obstacle Clearance Height) is the lowest height (1) _____ below which an aircraft cannot descend without infringing (2) _____.

options.a: (1) above the terrain below you; (2) the obstacle clearance criteria
options.b: (1) above the terrain below you; (2) the threshold height minima
options.c: (1) above the aerodrome; (2) the obstacle clearance criteria
options.d: (1) above the aerodrome; (2) the threshold height minima
